name: pgxsinkit

scripts.bench:publish: cd apps/perf-lab && BENCH_BASE=/bench/ BENCH_OUTDIR=../docs/dist/bench bun run build && mv ../docs/dist/bench/bench.html ../docs/dist/bench/index.html
scripts.check: bun run skills:validate && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run docs:adr:check && bun run electric:check && bun run sync:function:check && bun run test
scripts.check:fast: bun run skills:validate && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run electric:check && bun run test:unit:fast
scripts.db:board:sync-fn: bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --registry packages/board-schema/src/registry.ts --export boardSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/board-drizzle.config.ts --name board_sync_artifact
scripts.demo:build: cd apps/board && BOARD_DEMO_BASE=/demo/ BOARD_DEMO_OUTDIR=../docs/dist/demo VITE_BOARD_HASH_ROUTING=1 bun run build
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:adr:check && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.e2e:board:serve: cd apps/board && VITE_E2E=1 bun run build && bun run preview
scripts.e2e:opfs-repacked:serve: vite --config tests/e2e/opfs-repacked/vite.config.ts build && vite --config tests/e2e/opfs-repacked/vite.config.ts preview
scripts.e2e:placement:serve: vite --config tests/e2e/placement/vite.config.ts build && vite --config tests/e2e/placement/vite.config.ts preview
scripts.lint: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.sync:function:check: bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --utilities --check --project-dir . --config infra/drizzle.config.ts --name pgxsinkit_utilities && bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --utilities --check --project-dir . --config infra/board-drizzle.config.ts --name pgxsinkit_utilities && bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --check --registry packages/schema/src/registry.ts --export demoMembershipSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/drizzle.config.ts && bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --check --registry packages/board-schema/src/registry.ts --export boardSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/board-drizzle.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:integration:contract && bun run test:integration:implementation && bun run test:integration:sync-e2e && bun run test:integration:worker && bun run test:integration:placement
scripts.test:unit:fast: bun scripts/run-unit-tests.ts tests/unit/board-auth-transition.test.ts tests/unit/boot-report.test.ts tests/unit/boot-report-provision.test.ts tests/unit/client-boot-optimizations.test.ts tests/unit/client-precreated-pglite.test.ts tests/unit/client-export-store.test.ts tests/unit/client-lifecycle-contention.test.ts tests/unit/lifecycle-slot.test.ts tests/unit/store-path.test.ts tests/unit/board-store-registry.test.ts tests/unit/bulk-apply.test.ts tests/unit/apply-fingerprint.test.ts tests/unit/apply-strategy.test.ts tests/unit/client-schema.test.ts tests/unit/concurrent-mutation-mix.test.ts tests/unit/conflict-base-capture.test.ts tests/unit/conflict-handling.test.ts tests/unit/contracts-supabase-rls.test.ts tests/unit/contracts-grant-scope-rls.test.ts tests/unit/contracts.test.ts tests/unit/write-activation-diagnostic.test.ts tests/unit/convergence.test.ts tests/unit/convergence-model.test.ts tests/unit/demo-rls-schema.test.ts tests/unit/electric-proxy.test.ts tests/unit/generate-cli.test.ts tests/unit/mutation-state.test.ts tests/unit/mutation-recovery-marker.test.ts tests/unit/schema-fingerprint-fast-path.test.ts tests/unit/perf-lab-schema.test.ts tests/unit/perf-scenario.test.ts tests/unit/plpgsql-apply.test.ts tests/unit/utilities-migration.test.ts tests/unit/public-package-set.test.ts tests/unit/public-package-artifacts.test.ts tests/unit/create-payload-validation.test.ts tests/unit/dropped-payload-key-warning.test.ts tests/unit/electric-version.test.ts tests/unit/sql-state.test.ts tests/unit/nudge-buster.test.ts tests/unit/registry-diff.test.ts tests/unit/registry-fingerprint.test.ts tests/unit/row-expectations.test.ts tests/unit/row-filter-shape.test.ts tests/unit/server-shape-proxy.test.ts tests/unit/shape-fold.test.ts tests/unit/shape-inbox.test.ts tests/unit/shape-sync.test.ts tests/unit/shape-tags.test.ts tests/unit/sql-identifier.test.ts tests/unit/sync-auth.test.ts tests/unit/sync-drizzle-executor.test.ts tests/unit/board-schema.test.ts tests/unit/react-live-row-remap.test.ts tests/unit/worker-live-diff.test.ts tests/unit/worker-protocol.test.ts tests/unit/worker-group-ready.test.ts tests/unit/worker-bridge.test.ts tests/unit/worker-one-shot-reads.test.ts tests/unit/worker-export-store.test.ts tests/unit/worker-provision-offline.test.ts tests/unit/lazy-guard.test.ts tests/unit/client-live-hydration.test.ts tests/unit/worker-live-hydration.test.ts tests/unit/staged-boot-readiness.test.ts tests/unit/staged-boot-readiness-offline.test.ts tests/unit/perf-lab-bench-backend-defaults.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/board/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/perf-lab/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: bun run guard:tmp-files && bun run skills:pins:check && bun run format && bun run check:fast
scripts.validate:full: bun run guard:tmp-files && bun run skills:pins:check && bun run format && bun run check

//overrides: TEMPORARY: alias @electric-sql/pglite to the @pgxsinkit fork carrying the initdb-fs-leak fix (upstream 0.5.4 leaks the inner-instance fs during initdb, breaking the OPFS `options.fs` lane). Remove once upstream ships branch fix/initdb-inner-instance-fs-leak. See docs/runbooks/pglite-fork-override.md.
